name: Prepare + Read Config
func:
const tz = env.get("ADDON_TIMEZONE") || "UTC";
const contractType = String(env.get("CONTRACT_TYPE") || "fixed").trim();
const currency = String(env.get("CURRENCY") || "EUR").trim();
const mqttPrefix = String(env.get("MQTT_PREFIX") || "smart_energy_finance").trim() || "smart_energy_finance";

msg.cfg = {
    tz,
    contractType,
    currency,
    mqttPrefix,
    monthlySubscriptionPrice: Number(env.get("MONTHLY_SUBSCRIPTION_PRICE") || 0),
    fixedImportPrice: Number(env.get("FIXED_IMPORT_PRICE") || 0),
    fixedExportPrice: Number(env.get("FIXED_EXPORT_PRICE") || 0),

    tariff1: { name: String(env.get("TARIFF_1_NAME") || "").trim(), price: Number(env.get("TARIFF_1_PRICE") || 0), start: String(env.get("TARIFF_1_START") || "").trim(), end: String(env.get("TARIFF_1_END") || "").trim() },
    tariff2: { name: String(env.get("TARIFF_2_NAME") || "").trim(), price: Number(env.get("TARIFF_2_PRICE") || 0), start: String(env.get("TARIFF_2_START") || "").trim(), end: String(env.get("TARIFF_2_END") || "").trim() },
    tariff3: { name: String(env.get("TARIFF_3_NAME") || "").trim(), price: Number(env.get("TARIFF_3_PRICE") || 0), start: String(env.get("TARIFF_3_START") || "").trim(), end: String(env.get("TARIFF_3_END") || "").trim() },
    tariff4: { name: String(env.get("TARIFF_4_NAME") || "").trim(), price: Number(env.get("TARIFF_4_PRICE") || 0), start: String(env.get("TARIFF_4_START") || "").trim(), end: String(env.get("TARIFF_4_END") || "").trim() },

    tempo: {
        colorEntity: String(env.get("TEMPO_COLOR_ENTITY") || "").trim(),
        blueHc: Number(env.get("TEMPO_BLUE_HC_PRICE") || 0),
        blueHp: Number(env.get("TEMPO_BLUE_HP_PRICE") || 0),
        whiteHc: Number(env.get("TEMPO_WHITE_HC_PRICE") || 0),
        whiteHp: Number(env.get("TEMPO_WHITE_HP_PRICE") || 0),
        redHc: Number(env.get("TEMPO_RED_HC_PRICE") || 0),
        redHp: Number(env.get("TEMPO_RED_HP_PRICE") || 0),
        hcSlot1Start: String(env.get("TEMPO_HC_SLOT_1_START") || "22:00").trim(),
        hcSlot1End: String(env.get("TEMPO_HC_SLOT_1_END") || "06:00").trim(),
        hcSlot2Start: String(env.get("TEMPO_HC_SLOT_2_START") || "").trim(),
        hcSlot2End: String(env.get("TEMPO_HC_SLOT_2_END") || "").trim(),
        hcSlot3Start: String(env.get("TEMPO_HC_SLOT_3_START") || "").trim(),
        hcSlot3End: String(env.get("TEMPO_HC_SLOT_3_END") || "").trim()
    },

    solarEnabled: String(env.get("SOLAR_ENABLED") || "false") === "true",
    solarInputMode: String(env.get("SOLAR_INPUT_MODE") || "energy").trim(),
    solarEnergyEntity: String(env.get("SOLAR_ENERGY_ENTITY") || "").trim(),
    solarPowerEntity: String(env.get("SOLAR_POWER_ENTITY") || "").trim(),

    loadEnabled: String(env.get("LOAD_ENABLED") || "false") === "true",
    loadInputMode: String(env.get("LOAD_INPUT_MODE") || "energy").trim(),
    loadEnergyEntity: String(env.get("LOAD_ENERGY_ENTITY") || "").trim(),
    loadPowerEntity: String(env.get("LOAD_POWER_ENTITY") || "").trim(),

    batteryEnabled: String(env.get("BATTERY_ENABLED") || "false") === "true",
    batteryInputMode: String(env.get("BATTERY_INPUT_MODE") || "energy").trim(),
    batteryChargeEnergyEntity: String(env.get("BATTERY_CHARGE_ENERGY_ENTITY") || "").trim(),
    batteryDischargeEnergyEntity: String(env.get("BATTERY_DISCHARGE_ENERGY_ENTITY") || "").trim(),
    batteryChargePowerEntity: String(env.get("BATTERY_CHARGE_POWER_ENTITY") || "").trim(),
    batteryDischargePowerEntity: String(env.get("BATTERY_DISCHARGE_POWER_ENTITY") || "").trim(),

    gridEnabled: String(env.get("GRID_ENABLED") || "false") === "true",
    gridInputMode: String(env.get("GRID_INPUT_MODE") || "energy").trim(),
    gridImportEnergyEntity: String(env.get("GRID_IMPORT_ENERGY_ENTITY") || "").trim(),
    gridExportEnergyEntity: String(env.get("GRID_EXPORT_ENERGY_ENTITY") || "").trim(),
    gridImportPowerEntity: String(env.get("GRID_IMPORT_POWER_ENTITY") || "").trim(),
    gridExportPowerEntity: String(env.get("GRID_EXPORT_POWER_ENTITY") || "").trim()
};

return msg;

name: Build HA States Request
Extract Configured Entities
Daily Store + Finance Engine
Build Discovery Messages
Normalize Split Item
